description:
You are a mission operations engineer. An end-of-life LEO satellite requires a passivation maneuver to deplete its remaining propellant and lower its perigee to accelerate reentry. Using the specifications in ~/Desktop/passivation_specs.txt, create and run a GMAT script for the PassivationSat simulating a continuous retrograde finite burn until the tank is empty (fuel mass = 0). Configure the spacecraft, ChemicalTank, ChemicalThruster, and FiniteBurn according to the provided specs. Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/passivation.script and write a report to ~/GMAT_output/passivation_report.txt containing the following fields: initial_mass_kg, final_mass_kg, final_periapsis_alt_km, and burn_duration_sec.

Login: username=ga, password=password123
